title: AMD Just Built the World's Most Advanced Chip
script: AMD just kicked off production of the world's first 2-nanometer processor. Codenamed Venice, the 6th generation EPYC chip is built on TSMC's newest process — smaller than any chip that has ever shipped. Smaller means more power, less heat, and a direct shot at Nvidia's grip on AI compute. AMD stock jumped 8%. The chip wars just entered a new era.
